task_name: Add Scope Resolver Review Suite Coverage
goal: Add Scope Resolver checks to the shared Bluepilot review suite and document the new local review coverage.
claims: BP-046 adds Scope Resolver checks to the shared Bluepilot review suite.
BP-046 adds output invariant coverage that keeps writes_allowed_now and task_create_allowed false.
BP-046 does not change Scope Resolver runtime behavior or fixtures.
assumptions: BP-045 already introduced the local Scope Resolver mock and golden fixtures.
Review suite coverage should be the shared entry point for local reviewers.
Invariant tests are needed before later Builder handoff work.
dod: tools/test-bluepilot-review-suite.cjs runs Scope Resolver syntax, fixtures, and invariant checks.
docs/BLUEPILOT_REVIEW_SUITE_v0.md mentions Scope Resolver coverage and limits.
stop_conditions: Scope Resolver runtime or fixture changes become necessary
Live Builder, auth, secrets, DB, deploy, task create, execute, approve, or push becomes necessary
prior_task_findings: BP-045 added a local Scope Resolver mock but did not yet wire it into the shared Bluepilot Review Suite.
